description:
Match ID: 058aa4f1-8af7-4a58-84e7-8e0c23d10fca

1st clip: Using extended barrel on the F2 but doesn't appear to have any vertical climb when shooting at Aruni. (Although there is visual recoil, the bullets form a horizontal line in the wall, slowed down for clarity in the 4th clip) Additionally, aimed at Aruni's head through the wall instead of pre-firing the corner she was peeking from.

2nd clip: Aims at Aruni twice through walls: near the beginning and as she's leaving. Continues to follow where Aruni went without actually pre-aiming anything.

3rd clip: Rappels into admin without droning, continues into meeting/CEO without droning. Once the Tubarao engages them in CEO, they aimlessly run into the corner and then re-peek and appear to snap onto Tubarao's head. This time the recoil appears to be non-existent.

Although this point is not conclusive proof, the stats of this player are definitely inconsistent with the gameplay provided. A legitimate player in Emerald/Diamond MMR who could boast a 1.6kd and 70% winrate would have substantially better movement and crosshair placement. It's also noteworthy that the suspect here used extended barrel and horizontal grip when available, and still managed to control recoil "perfectly" despite having poor game mechanics.
